name: SCD Type 1 (Overwrite)
description: Apply SCD Type 1 logic: overwrite changed attributes, insert new records, preserve unchanged ones

checks.name: 4 products total after merge
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM dim_product;

checks.name: Product 2 name updated
checks.query: SELECT product_name FROM dim_product WHERE product_id = 2;
checks.description: Product 2 name changed from 'Wireless Mouse' to 'Wireless Mouse v2'

checks.name: Product 3 category updated
checks.query: SELECT category FROM dim_product WHERE product_id = 3;

checks.name: Product 4 inserted
checks.query: SELECT product_name FROM dim_product WHERE product_id = 4;
checks.description: New product Webcam HD must be inserted

checks.name: Product 1 unchanged
checks.query: SELECT updated_at FROM dim_product WHERE product_id = 1;
checks.description: Product 1 (Laptop Pro) was not in stg_product_updates — must remain unchanged
